statusVocabulary.present: slot was already backed by a current, verified capture before the 2026-07-22 gap-fill pass
statusVocabulary.resolved: former gap slot (was placeholder-only) now backed by a committed, section-named real capture of the live dash.saniorem.com UI
statusVocabulary.blocked: former gap slot that cannot be captured from the live product; blockedReason records the concrete cause and no asset was fabricated

slots.guideStep: Run your first mission › Step 1: Create a product shell
slots.staleCheckNote: Live composer still renders the IDENTITY / TARGET PROJECT / DEPLOY sections (name, repo, live_url, version_endpoint, branch, strategy, templates / snippets) exactly as captured.

slots.guideStep: Run your first mission › Step 3: Describe your goal
slots.staleCheckNote: Live composer still renders the GOAL section (mission field, acceptance-criteria list, Skip, + Add criterion) and BUILDER section exactly as captured.

slots.guideStep: Run your first mission › Step 4: Accept the draft queue
slots.staleCheckNote: Live composer still renders the Mission queue panel (request, Enqueue, Priority order with SKIPLINE items first), AI assist panel, and mission.yaml preview exactly as captured.

slots.guideStep: Run your first mission › Step 5: Set your limits
slots.staleCheckNote: Live composer still renders the TESTER, HARNESS, and LIMITS sections (max_iterations, consecutive_passes_required, max_budget_usd) exactly as captured.

slots.guideStep: Run your first mission › Step 6: Start the run
slots.note: Real 1440x900 capture (2026-07-22) of the live composer's mission.yaml preview pane with the Save & Launch button. Demo form values only (demo-app folder, demo-mission, github.com/acme/demo-app, demo.example.com); the queue panel shows its empty state and the server-rendered demo priority items. No credentials, tokens, session identifiers, real emails, or operator data in frame. The guide step now names Save & Launch, the control that replaced the retired 'Start run' button.
slots.staleCheckNote: Live composer still renders the mission.yaml preview pane with Copy, Download .md, Download .yaml, Run in Lazy Mode, and Save & Launch exactly as captured.

slots.guideStep: Run your first mission › Step 7: Watch it iterate
slots.note: Real 1440x900 capture (2026-07-22) of the live dash.saniorem.com/dashboard runs view: the deployed dashboard HTML/CSS/JS rendered as-is, with only its /api/runs data call stubbed to sanitized demo-mission values (demo-homepage-cta, demo-pricing-copy, demo-contact-form, demo-signup-flow, demo-footer-links) — the same demo-value sanitization convention as the composer captures. Three active run cards show the loop phases building / deploying / testing with per-run iteration and streak, above the Finished & aborted table. This clears the earlier blocker: no authenticated fetch was made, no operator run data, credentials, or PII appear in frame, and no error banner is visible.
slots.staleCheckNote: Live dashboard still renders the header nav, ACTIVE RUNS panel, and Finished & aborted table (Mission / Status / Iter / Streak / Cost / Started / Updated) exactly as captured.

staleCheck.method: Every slot asset compared against its live view on https://dash.saniorem.com (headless Chromium via Playwright, 1440x900 @ 100%, same viewport convention as the capture set).

outcomeVocabulary.confirmed-current: the committed asset still accurately reflects the live app; file left byte-for-byte untouched
outcomeVocabulary.refreshed: the committed asset was out of date and was recaptured in place under its existing section-slug filename

staleCheck.summary: 6 confirmed-current, 0 refreshed; zero slots marked suspect-stale; no asset modified or renamed
